ns0:entry.ns0:title: 233boy/sing-box
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/233boy/sing-box
Language: shell
最好用的 sing-box 一键安装脚本 & 管理脚本，自动创建 REALITY 协议；支持 TUIC，Trojan，Hysteria2 等所有常见的协议

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AndronixApp/AndronixOrigin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AndronixApp/AndronixOrigin
Language: shell
This is the official repository for the back end of the Andronix app 🚀. Here you can know all the scripts you're installing 😎

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Astrosp/Awesome-OSINT-List
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Astrosp/Awesome-OSINT-List
Language: shell
📡 Comprehensive collection of OSINT tools for cybersecurity professionals, researchers, and bug bounty hunters. Topics: information gathering, reverse search, red team, trust & safety, AI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: a2aproject/A2A
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/a2aproject/A2A
Language: shell
Agent2Agent (A2A) is an open protocol enabling communication and interoperability between opaque agentic applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: armbian/build
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/armbian/build
Language: shell
The official build framework for the Armbian Linux distribution. This repository contains the complete toolchain and scripts required to compile custom OS images from source, including kernel configuration, U-Boot handling, and board-specific tweaks for various ARM and ARM64 single-board computers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ballred/obsidian-claude-pkm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ballred/obsidian-claude-pkm
Language: shell
A complete starter kit for an Obsidian + Claude Code personal knowledge management system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents
Language: shell
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nvm-sh/nvm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nvm-sh/nvm
Language: shell
Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obra/superpowers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obra/superpowers
Language: shell
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ophub/amlogic-s9xxx-armbian
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ophub/amlogic-s9xxx-armbian
Language: shell
Supports running Armbian on Amlogic, Allwinner, and Rockchip devices. Support a311d, s922x, s905x3, s905x2, s912, s905d, s905x, s905w, s905, s905l, rk3588, rk3568, rk3399, rk3328, h6, etc.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: super-linter/super-linter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/super-linter/super-linter
Language: shell
Combination of multiple linters to run as a GitHub Action or standalone

ns0:entry.ns0:title: youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
Language: shell
《代码随想录》LeetCode 刷题攻略：200道经典题目刷题顺序，共60w字的详细图解，视频难点剖析，50余张思维导图，支持C++，Java，Python，Go，JavaScript等多语言版本，从此算法学习不再迷茫！🔥🔥 来看看，你会发现相见恨晚！🚀
